# UC-22.56.28 · TSA-SD multi-modal master compliance dashboard + executive attestation roll-up

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Governance &middot; **Wave:** Run &middot; **Status:** Verified

*All the smaller TSA cyber checks roll up into one big dashboard. The boss can see one screen and know whether anything is wrong.*

---

## Description

Roll-up panel showing UC-22.56.x compliance health for an inspector-facing scorecard.

## Value

Single dashboard for CC + CISO + Board + inspector. Closes the audit-trail loop on TSA SD subcategory.

## Implementation

(1) Schedule UC-22.56.28 daily. (2) Build `TSA SD Master Scorecard` dashboard. (3) Wire monthly executive attestation to roll-up.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.56.28` archived daily to `audit_evidence` with `tsa_sd_clause="TSA-SD-multi-master-rollup"`.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Force any UC-22.56.x violation. UC-22.56.28 MUST reflect within 24h.

### Negative scenario

Resolve all violations. UC-22.56.28 MUST roll up green.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- All UC-22.56.1 through UC-22.56.27 running and writing to `audit_evidence`.

## Step 1 — Schedule

```ini
[UC-22.56.28: TSA SD Master Roll-Up]
cron_schedule = 33 11 * * *
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.56.28,reg=TSA-Surface,clause=TSA-SD-multi-master-rollup
alert.severity = 4
```

## Step 2 — Runbook

Monthly executive attestation: CC reviews the dashboard with CISO and signs off. Quarterly board pack derives from this UC.

## Step 3 — Troubleshooting

- **UC drift**: a UC silently failing produces a 'stale' marker; investigate that UC, not the roll-up.

**TSA-specific failure modes**:
- **Inspector deep-dive on individual UC**: ensure each UC's underlying evidence stands alone.

## SPL

```spl
search index=audit_evidence reg=TSA-Surface earliest=-30d@d
| eval uc = case(
    match(_raw, "uc=22\.56\."), "22.56." + replace(_raw, ".*uc=22\.56\.(\d+).*", "\1"),
    1=1, "unknown")
| stats count as evidence_rows latest(_time) as last_evidence by uc
| eval hours_since_evidence = round((now() - last_evidence) / 3600, 1)
| eval health = case(
    hours_since_evidence > 48, "stale",
    evidence_rows = 0, "missing",
    1=1, "current")
| sort uc
| table uc evidence_rows last_evidence hours_since_evidence health
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) Per-UC health row. (Panel 2) 30-day trend. (Panel 3) Top-3 outstanding issues. (Panel 4) Executive attestation history.

## Known False Positives

1. **UC search lag**: roll-up may show stale due to upstream UC cadence; tune `hours_since_evidence` per UC.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `tsa_22_56_28_exceptions`.

## References

- [TSA SD Cybersecurity Roll-Up Expectations](https://www.tsa.gov/cybersecurity)
